criteria.name: Identity clarity
criteria.desc: Persona name, role, and voice are unambiguous

criteria.name: Behavioral rules
criteria.desc: Clear do/don't rules for response style

criteria.name: Memory integration
criteria.desc: Rules for when to search/save memory

criteria.name: Error handling
criteria.desc: Guidance for graceful failure

criteria.name: Security posture
criteria.desc: Rules against leaking secrets or breaking character

criteria.name: Consistency
criteria.desc: No contradictory instructions

criteria.name: Agent roster clarity
criteria.desc: Clear list of agents and their roles

criteria.name: Routing rules
criteria.desc: When to delegate to which agent

criteria.name: Capability boundaries
criteria.desc: What each agent can and cannot do

criteria.name: Escalation paths
criteria.desc: How to handle requests outside agent scope

criteria.name: Status tracking
criteria.desc: Current agent availability and health

criteria.name: Tool catalog completeness
criteria.desc: All available tools listed with descriptions

criteria.name: Usage examples
criteria.desc: Clear examples for each tool

criteria.name: Error handling
criteria.desc: What to do when a tool fails

criteria.name: Routing logic
criteria.desc: When to use which tool

criteria.name: Security rules
criteria.desc: Tool access controls and limits

criteria.name: Search triggers
criteria.desc: Clear rules for when to search memory

criteria.name: Save triggers
criteria.desc: Clear rules for when to save to memory

criteria.name: Format consistency
criteria.desc: Consistent memory entry format

criteria.name: Dedup rules
criteria.desc: Rules to avoid duplicate memories
